final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing hand-drawn infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships between AI concepts, designed for educational sharing on platforms like Xiaohongshu or WeChat.

Style/medium: hand-drawn illustration infographic, sketchnote / visual note-taking aesthetic, ink-and-watercolor wash accents
Composition: multi-panel layout with each concept in its own illustrated node, connected by hand-drawn arrows and relationship lines showing how concepts link; central hub-and-spoke or flow-map structure
Subject: seven concept nodes —
  • AI — definition panel with a small brain/robot icon
  • MCP (Model Context Protocol) — definition panel with a plug/connector icon
  • AI Agent — definition panel with a gear-and-robot icon
  • OpenClaw — definition panel with a claw/tool icon
  • AI Skill — definition panel with a lightning-bolt/skill badge icon
  • 蒸馏 (Distillation) — definition panel with a flask/funnel icon
  • CLI — definition panel with a terminal/command-line icon
  Relationship annotations between nodes (e.g., "AI Agent uses AI Skills", "MCP connects AI Agent to tools", "蒸馏 compresses AI models", "CLI invokes AI Agents via OpenClaw")
Scene/backdrop: light cream or off-white paper texture background, as if drawn on a sketchbook page
Lighting/mood: bright, approachable, friendly and educational
Color palette: warm off-white base with hand-drawn ink lines, soft accent colors per concept node (muted blue, coral, sage green, amber) to visually distinguish each
Materials/textures: sketchbook paper grain, hand-inked outlines with loose watercolor fills, occasional pencil shading
Text (verbatim): AI、MCP、AI Agent、OpenClaw、AI Skill、蒸馏、CLI
Constraints: all seven concept names must appear verbatim as node labels; relationship arrows must be labeled; layout must be readable at a glance; bilingual labels acceptable (Chinese concept name + short English annotation)
Avoid: sterile corporate infographic style, flat vector icon-only layout, dark background, overly dense text blocks with no illustration
